slots.notes: Full-screen hero background. A dark, cyber-security style background. Native placeholder is an abstract security/dashboard background; replace with brand-specific visual asset. Fills the entire page. No people, no text.
The brand logo at top-left. About 48px. Native placeholder is a stylized circular shape or abstract logo mark.
Primary CTA button ('Get Started', 'Book a Demo'). Rounded button, border-radius 8px. Running text - no data backend.
Heading, body, subtext. Heading large, font-bold, tracking-tight. Supply dummy text. No data backend.

mechanic: A professional hero with dark bg, logo, headline, body, subtext, and CTA button. Left-text, right-image layout. Framer Motion useInView.
techDelivery: React 18 + TypeScript. Tailwind CSS 3. Framer Motion v12.
reskinNotes: Blank slate - dummy text, no backend.
